opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My shoulder popped completely out of its socket when I fell, and my arm is stuck out like this and killing me!
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: Severe shoulder pain and deformity after a fall onto an outstretched arm.

symptom_narrative.onset: 45 minutes ago, tripped and fell onto an outstretched hand
symptom_narrative.character: severe pain localized to the shoulder joint after a sudden 'pop'
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: any attempt to move the joint
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: abnormal prominence at the front of the shoulder, slight numbness/tingling down the outer upper arm
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: sitting on a chair supporting the elbow with the other hand, arm held out in an abnormal position

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: roommate present, tripped over a loose rug which has now been removed

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: wants pain relief and is wondering if someone can just push it back into place
